text.title: AI Post-Mortem Template Worked Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example for the ai-post-mortem-template methodology.

example.title: Hallucination cluster in billing-agent (May 2026)
example.narrative: Billing agent invented refund policy clauses. Root cause: retrieval index missed last week's policy update (freshness cap too loose). Action items: tighten freshness to 24h, add policy-update integration test, eval suite case for new policy.
example.artifact: post-mortem.md with timeline + RCA + 4 action items.
